info.description: Local REST API for Pheo projects, stores, source material, methodology gates, review points, observations, human reviews, release receipts, and memory exports.
info.title: Pheo Local API

post.summary: Observe endpoint output using the active store

Import traces using the active store

get.summary: List stores in the active project
List endpoint or ingest connections for a store
Export a memory pack for a store
List review points for a store

post.summary: Call an OpenAI-compatible endpoint and observe the output
Import trace records as review packets

get.summary: List source material for a store

post.summary: Attach source material to a store
Call an OpenAI-compatible endpoint and create a run
